title: Dell Technologies Increases AI & Hyperscale Server Production
summary: Dell expanded production for AI and hyperscale servers to meet growing cloud demand; price hikes (~15%) expected due to memory shortages.

title: HPE ProLiant Gen12 Premier Solutions for Azure Local Launching
summary: HPE ProLiant Compute DL380 Gen12 Server Premier Solutions for Azure Local set for availability in March; MWC edge/vRAN products shipping.

title: Lenovo Signals Server Repricing Due to Memory Crisis
summary: Lenovo implemented strict quote validity (14-30 days) and warned of repricing for undelivered servers as DRAM/NAND costs surge 60%.

title: Supermicro Expands High-Density Blade Platforms
summary: Supermicro introduced new modular blade systems for cloud and enterprise, leveraging 'white-box' style open architecture hardware.

title: Quanta AI Server Revenue Surges 43% Year-over-Year
summary: Quanta's AI server momentum continues with Q1 rack shipments hitting 4,500 units; full-year AI server target set for 70k-80k units.

title: Gigabyte B683-Z80-LAS1 High-Density Blade Shipments Begin
summary: Gigabyte started shipping its 6U, 10-node AMD EPYC blade system featuring direct liquid cooling for telco and edge AI applications.

title: Global AI Server Shipments Hit New Peak in Q1 2026
summary: High-end rack production (GB200/GB300) hit 6,500 units in February, up 6% MoM; lead times extending as server costs rise 15%.
